flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 20% at CUNY Brooklyn College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (10.4k vs 13.1k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at CUNY Brooklyn College fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (12.6k → 10.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at CUNY Brooklyn College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at CUNY Brooklyn College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (30.5% → 34.2%).
